arts.ttl: Carabao Cup draw LIVE as Manchester United and Tottenham fight for semi-final spot
arts.sum: Tonight's impending Carabao Cup quarter-final tie between Tottenham Hotspur and Man United (8pm) will be followed by the semi-final draw.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Manchester United LIVE: Carabao Cup team news and line-ups as Amorim faces Rashford decision
arts.sum: Spurs and United will be desperate to reach the semi-finals in what has been a disappointing season so far for both

arts.ttl: 'Petty' Ratcliffe SLAMMED for £50 cuts for stewards at Man Utd
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe has continued his cost-cutting measures at Manchester United after it was revealed that cash prizes and bonuses to stewards, worth up to £150, have been scrapped And i report that stewards at Old Trafford – some of the club’s lowest-paid members of staff – have also seen cuts this season such as the scrapping of a £100 bonus for every 10 matches.

arts.ttl: Man United concern as Marcus Rashford wage demands 'threaten to scupper' January exit
arts.sum: Manchester United attacker Marcus Rashford is reportedly preparing to face serious hurdles as he attempts to leave Old Trafford during the January window.

arts.sum: Man Utd play Tottenham in the Carabao Cup quarter-finals tonight and we'll bring you live updates from the game.

arts.ttl: Man Utd slammed as 'appalling' and 'lacklustre' under Ruben Amorim despite Man City win
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim earned his fourth win in seven games since becoming Manchester United boss with a dramatic 2-1 win over Manchester City last week, but club legend Dwight Yorke was unimpressed with the team

arts.ttl: Tottenham predicted team vs Man Utd as Ange Postecoglou makes Spence, Udogie and Bergvall calls
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou and Tottenham face a huge night of football on Thursday evening when they welcome Manchester United to Tottenham Hotspur Stadium. Postecoglou's men should certainly go into the game in confident mood after hitting Southampton for five on Sunday evening.
